intro: This archive contains eight articles from April 14 to April 21, 2026, covering botnet activity. The reported incidents were predominantly high or critical in severity. The threat actors The Gentlemen and W3LL were active, exploiting vulnerabilities including CVE-2024-3721 and CVE-2023-33538. Their campaigns targeted a wide range of sectors, notably corporate, finance, technology, and residential environments. Geographically, impacts were felt globally, with specific reporting from the Czech republic. The coverage reflects a concentrated period of significant botnet threats across multiple critical industries.
